$schema_note: Machine-readable bibliography for EM-Tracking-Definitive-Guide. Every entry must be verifiable. 'verified' = checked against an authoritative index (IEEE Xplore, PubMed, DOI resolver, patent office) during research. Fields: id, type, title, authors, year, venue, volume, issue, pages, doi, url, publisher, source_type, keywords, relevance, confidence, notes, verified.

entries.title: Magnetic Position and Orientation Tracking System
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
entries.notes: Seminal formalization of quasi-static magnetic-dipole 6-DOF tracking. DOI inferred from IEEE TAES AES-15(5); page range 709-718 confirmed via multiple indexes.

entries.title: Electromagnetic Tracking in Medicine—A Review of Technology, Validation, and Applications
entries.notes: The definitive modern review of medical EMT. DOI and citation verified via PubMed/dblp.

entries.title: Design and application of an assessment protocol for electromagnetic tracking systems
entries.notes: Standardized phantom/protocol for comparable EMT accuracy assessment. DOI verified. Volume/issue/pages to re-confirm against Wiley record.

entries.title: A Novel Method for Nonfluoroscopic Catheter-Based Electroanatomical Mapping of the Heart: In Vitro and In Vivo Accuracy Results
entries.notes: Foundational clinical paper underlying the Biosense CARTO system. PMID 9118532 verified.

entries.title: Systematic distortions in magnetic position digitizers
entries.notes: Early systematic characterization of field distortion in magnetic digitizers. DOI/pages to re-confirm against Wiley record; citation widely reported as Med Phys 25(11):2242-2248.

entries.title: A survey of electromagnetic position tracker calibration techniques
entries.notes: Survey of EMT calibration/distortion-correction methods (interpolation, polynomial, shape functions). DOI verified; volume/issue/pages to re-confirm.

entries.title: A new method for magnetic position and orientation tracking
entries.notes: Rotating quasi-static field method; alternative excitation/decoding strategy. DOI to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: 3-D Magnetic Tracking of a Single Subminiature Coil with a Large 2-D Array of Uniaxial Transmitters
entries.notes: Array-of-transmitters architecture with subarray tracking for speed. DOI/article-id to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: Magnetic Sensors and Their Applications
entries.notes: Canonical review comparing all major magnetic sensor families incl. search coil, fluxgate, Hall, AMR, GMR, magnetic tunnel junctions. Vol 6, pp 631-649 confirmed; DOI to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: Magnetoresistive sensor detectivity: A comparative analysis
entries.notes: Comparative noise/detectivity analysis of GMR vs TMR(MTJ); finds detectivity scales with die area and converges across types when normalized for linear range. DOI verified via AIP.

entries.title: Electromagnetic tracking in the clinical environment
entries.notes: Clinical-environment characterization of EMT accuracy and distortion. Citation 36(3):876-892, DOI 10.1118/1.3075829, PMID 19378748 verified.

entries.title: Aurora Electromagnetic Tracking System — Sensors (5DOF/6DOF, micro 0.3 mm)
entries.notes: Vendor source for medical-grade sensor form factors (e.g., micro 5DOF ~0.3 mm dia). Vendor-reported; access year approximate.

entries.title: IEC 60601-1 Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance
entries.notes: Governing safety standard for medical electrical equipment. Patient leakage limits e.g. Type CF 10 uA normal / 50 uA single-fault; two Means of Protection required. Edition history per IEC webstore.

entries.title: IEC 60601-1-2 Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and tests
entries.notes: EMC collateral standard. 4th ed (2014) shifted to risk/intended-use-based tests by environment (professional healthcare / home / special). Edition 4.1 = Amendment 1 (2020).

entries.title: The Art of Electronics, 3rd Edition
entries.notes: Standard reference for low-noise analog design (amplifier voltage/current noise, noise matching, instrumentation amps). ISBN 978-0521809269.

entries.title: Analog-to-Digital Converter Survey and Analysis
entries.venue: IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
entries.notes: Canonical ADC survey; establishes resolution-vs-rate trends and limiting mechanisms (thermal at low rate, ~1 bit/octave fall-off at high rate; aperture jitter). DOI 10.1109/49.761034 verified.

entries.title: IEEE Standard for Terminology and Test Methods for Analog-to-Digital Converters
entries.notes: Defines ADC error terminology and FFT-based test methods (ENOB from SINAD, etc.). Multiple editions (2000/2010/2023); cite the edition used in a given measurement.

entries.title: Frequency-domain description of a lock-in amplifier
entries.notes: Clear pedagogical/quantitative treatment of lock-in (synchronous) detection. DOI 10.1119/1.17629 verified.

entries.title: A New Approach to Linear Filtering and Prediction Problems
entries.venue: Transactions of the ASME — Journal of Basic Engineering
entries.notes: The foundational Kalman filter paper. Vol 82(1):35-45, DOI 10.1115/1.3662552 verified.

entries.title: Unscented Filtering and Nonlinear Estimation
entries.notes: Definitive review of the unscented transform/UKF for nonlinear estimation. DOI 10.1109/JPROC.2003.823141 verified.

entries.title: Estimation with Applications to Tracking and Navigation: Theory, Algorithms and Software
entries.notes: Standard reference for estimation/tracking (KF/EKF, filtering, CRLB, fusion). ISBN 978-0471416555; DOI 10.1002/0471221279.

entries.title: An Algorithm for Least-Squares Estimation of Nonlinear Parameters
entries.venue: Journal of the Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics
entries.notes: The Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm; workhorse nonlinear solver for EMT pose. DOI 10.1137/0111030 verified.

entries.title: Fundamentals of Statistical Signal Processing, Volume I: Estimation Theory
entries.notes: Standard reference for MLE, CRLB/Fisher information, and Bayesian estimation used in Ch. 23-24. ISBN 0133457117.

entries.title: Numerical Optimization, 2nd Edition
entries.venue: Springer (Springer Series in Operations Research and Financial Engineering)
entries.notes: Standard numerical-optimization reference (Gauss-Newton, trust-region/LM, convergence, conditioning). ISBN 9780387303031.

entries.title: Interference during the use of an electromagnetic tracking system under OR conditions
entries.notes: Quantifies EMT interference under operating-room conditions: ambient EM noise error <0.15 mm RMS, but ferromagnetic/electrical devices up to 8.4 mm / 166 deg. DOI verified; PMID 12020992.

entries.title: Constant TMR magnetic field sensor detectivity with bias voltage
entries.venue: arXiv preprint (cf. published version in Sensors)
entries.notes: Shows TMR detectivity stays roughly constant vs bias voltage because sensitivity and noise scale together — central to the 'bias-reference noise in biased sensors' error term. arXiv:2103.04750 (authors verified); a published Sensors version exists (to link).

entries.title: Enhancing electromagnetic tracking accuracy in medical applications using pre-trained witness sensor distortion models
entries.venue: International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
entries.notes: Witness-sensor distortion compensation: measures field variation at a witness position to identify/compensate a distorter without sensors on it; C-arm error reduced to 1.52 mm RMS. DOI verified.

entries.title: Neural network-based calibration of electromagnetic tracking systems
entries.notes: Neural-network calibration compensating position and orientation error; compared to traditional methods. Vol 9(1):70-78, DOI verified.

entries.title: Polhemus History — Over 50 Years of Experience
entries.notes: Vendor history: founded 1969 by Bill Polhemus, Colchester VT; AC EM tracking originating in military aviation head-tracking. Products FASTRAK/LIBERTY/PATRIOT/G4. Vendor-reported.

entries.title: Our History — Northern Digital Inc. (NDI)
entries.notes: Vendor history of NDI (Waterloo, Ontario): optical (Polaris) and EM (Aurora) navigation. Vendor-reported; corroborate dates with independent sources.

entries.title: Ascension Technology of Milton acquired by Roper Industries
entries.notes: News report: Ascension (co-founded 1986 by Jack Scully & Ernie Blood; DC 'Flock of Birds') assets sold to Roper Industries (~US$19M, 2012); operated under NDI. Trade-press source.

entries.title: Johnson & Johnson Buys Biosense for $400 Mln in Shares
entries.notes: News: Biosense (founded 1993 by Shlomo Ben-Haim) acquired by J&J in 1997 (~$400M in shares); became Biosense Webster. Trade-press source; CARTO scientific basis is Gepstein 1997 [gepstein1997].

entries.title: Covidien acquisition of superDimension (electromagnetic navigation bronchoscopy); Medtronic–Covidien close (2015)
entries.notes: superDimension ENB acquired by Covidien (~$300M, 2012); Medtronic closed Covidien acquisition Jan 2015. Trade-press/vendor sources; verify exact figures if cited precisely.

entries.title: Electromagnetic Navigation Bronchoscopy for Peripheral Pulmonary Lesions: One-Year Results of the Prospective, Multicenter NAVIGATE Study
entries.notes: NAVIGATE one-year results: 12-month diagnostic yield ~73%; pneumothorax (grade >=2) 2.9%. PMID 30476574 verified; vol/issue/pages 14(3):445-458 to re-confirm against journal record. 'et al.' — full author list to expand.

entries.title: Optical magnetometry
entries.notes: Foundational review of optical/atomic magnetometry; SERF sensitivity >1e-15 T/rtHz. Frontier sensor context. DOI 10.1038/nphys566 verified.

entries.title: Sensitivity optimization for NV-diamond magnetometry
entries.notes: Comprehensive review of NV-diamond magnetometry sensitivity limits and improvement strategies. RMP 92(1):015004, DOI verified.

entries.title: Object tracking and orientation determination means, system and process (US 3,868,565)
entries.notes: Foundational magnetic position/orientation patent (Polhemus/Kuipers lineage). Uses a nutating field with DC + AC-modulated carrier into orthogonal coils. Cf. companion US 3,983,474 (1976). Resolves the Ch.1 SPASYN open question. Patent number verified via Google Patents/FPO.

entries.title: Device for quantitatively measuring the relative position and orientation of two bodies in the presence of metals utilizing direct current magnetic fields (US 4,945,305)
entries.notes: Foundational pulsed/direct-current magnetic tracking patent (Ascension lineage); measures pose in presence of metals using DC fields. Cf. WO1996002008A1 (non-dipole fields). Patent number/inventor/assignee verified.

entries.title: System and method for generating three-dimensional location information of a medical probe (US 5,391,199)
entries.notes: Catheter localization: sensor coil signals from three external radiator coils used to compute location — basis of CARTO (with Acker et al. US 5,558,091 and the broader Biosense patent family). Patent number verified.

entries.title: Anser EMT: the first open-source electromagnetic tracking platform for image-guided interventions
entries.venue: International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
entries.notes: Open-source FDM EMT: 8 field-generator coils at distinct frequencies, lock-in demodulation; reported 1.14 mm / 0.04 deg accuracy. Key reference for Ch.19 (FDM), Ch.20 (lock-in), Ch.31 (open-source ecosystem). DOI/PMID verified; vol 12(6):1059-1067 to re-confirm.

entries.title: Adaptive Noise Cancelling: Principles and Applications
entries.notes: Foundational adaptive noise-cancelling paper (LMS, reference/witness cancellation). Basis for the adaptive-interference and witness-sensor methods of Ch.20/27. DOI 10.1109/PROC.1975.10036 verified.

entries.title: Quaternion kinematics for the error-state Kalman filter
entries.notes: Definitive treatment of the error-state (multiplicative) Kalman filter for 3-D orientation — the correct way to estimate rotation without over-parameterization. arXiv:1711.02508 verified.

entries.title: A Tutorial on Particle Filters for Online Nonlinear/Non-Gaussian Bayesian Tracking
entries.notes: Canonical particle-filter tutorial (SIS/SIR, degeneracy, resampling, effective sample size). DOI 10.1109/78.978374 verified.

entries.title: An Economical Class of Digital Filters for Decimation and Interpolation
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
entries.notes: The cascaded integrator-comb (CIC) decimation filter — multiplier-free, the standard front-end decimator for Sigma-Delta ADC streams on FPGA (Ch.18/22). DOI 10.1109/TASSP.1981.1163535 verified.

entries.title: The CORDIC Trigonometric Computing Technique
entries.notes: CORDIC: multiplier-free shift-add computation of magnitude/phase (rectangular->polar), used for the lock-in sqrt(X^2+Y^2)/atan2 on FPGA. DOI verified.

entries.title: Robust Estimation of a Location Parameter
entries.notes: Introduces the Huber M-estimator / robust loss — the basis for outlier-robust pose solving (IRLS) in Ch.23. DOI 10.1214/aoms/1177703732 verified (Project Euclid: vol 35(1):73-101).

entries.title: Principles of GNSS, Inertial, and Multisensor Integrated Navigation Systems, 2nd Edition
entries.notes: Standard reference for dilution of precision (DOP) and multisensor (GNSS+INS) integration; cross-domain analogue for EMT conditioning (Ch.24) and fusion (Ch.21). ISBN 978-1-60807-005-3.

entries.title: Evaluation of measurement data — Guide to the expression of uncertainty in measurement (GUM)
authors: Joint Committee for Guides in Metrology (JCGM/BIPM)
entries.notes: The international metrology standard for uncertainty budgeting: Type A/B evaluation, law of propagation of uncertainty (eq 25.1), combined and expanded uncertainty (k coverage factor). Authoritative basis for the Ch.25 error budget. JCGM 100:2008.

entries.title: Classical Electrodynamics, 3rd Edition
entries.notes: Standard graduate electrodynamics reference (dipole fields, multipole expansion, quasistatics, radiation). ISBN 978-0471309321.

entries.title: Introduction to Electrodynamics, 4th Edition
entries.notes: Standard undergraduate electrodynamics reference; clear magnetostatics/dipole/Faraday treatment. ISBN 978-0321856562.

entries.title: The dielectric properties of biological tissues (Parts I–III)
entries.notes: Definitive measurements/models of tissue conductivity & permittivity (10 Hz-20 GHz). Backs the EMT tissue-transparency claim (low sigma, mu_r~=1 -> skin depth >> body at EMT frequencies). 3-part series; Part II DOI 10.1088/0031-9155/41/11/002, Part III .../003.

entries.title: Inductance Calculations: Working Formulas and Tables
entries.notes: The classic practical handbook of self/mutual-inductance formulas and tables for coils (coaxial circular filaments, single-layer solenoids, etc.) — design-from-first-principles reference for Ch.5/9/15. Dover reprint ISBN 978-0486495774.

entries.title: The Finite Element Method in Electromagnetics, 3rd Edition
entries.notes: Standard computational-electromagnetics reference (vector/edge elements, magnetostatic & eddy-current formulations, open-boundary treatment) for Ch.7. ISBN 978-1118571361.

entries.title: A novel approach to wireless electromagnetic tracking using frequency modulation radio communication
entries.venue: International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
entries.notes: Wireless EMT: FM-radio transmission of sensor data on the open-source Anser system; 1.61 mm / 0.04 deg vs 1.14 mm wired. Grounds the wireless-sensor / synchronization architecture (Ch.8 §8.6, Ch.10). DOI/PMID verified.

entries.title: Measuring position and orientation using magnetic fields (US 6,073,043)
entries.notes: Dual-coil 6-DOF magnetic sensor using exact (non-approximate) field coupling; basis for two-askew-coil catheter sensors (Ch.13 §13.3). Larger inter-axis angle gives better orientation accuracy. Patent number/inventor verified.

entries.title: A localization method using 3-axis magnetoresistive sensors for tracking of capsule endoscope
entries.notes: Peer-reviewed demonstration of MAGNETORESISTIVE-sensor tracking (vs NDE/biomagnetic): 16 3-axis MR sensors localize a magnetic marker at ~3.3 mm position / ~3 deg orientation, marker 100 mm above the array. Resolves the Ch.14 open question (MR used in a real position-tracking system). PMID/title/metrics verified via index; authors/venue/year to re-confirm (search API was rate-limited).

entries.title: Understanding Delta-Sigma Data Converters, 2nd Edition
entries.notes: The standard Sigma-Delta data-converter reference (noise-shaping NTF, order/OSR SNR, stability, MASH, decimation) for Ch.18. 2nd ed ISBN 9781119258278; 1st ed (2004) ISBN 9780471465850.

entries.title: Our Technology — AC Electromagnetic Tracking
entries.notes: Vendor self-description of AC electromagnetic tracking; used only for vendor-attributed claims. Access year approximate; treat as living document.

entries.title: Distorter Characterisation Using Mutual Inductance in Electromagnetic Tracking
entries.notes: Transmitter-side distortion sensing: modifies the field-generator array to transmit AND receive, using a mutual-inductance model to estimate a static distorter's location, magnitude and material from the generator side alone - the transmitter-side dual of witness sensing. Same group as Anser (jaeger2017) and cavaliere2023. DOI/PMC (PMC6165436) verified.

entries.title: Error compensation for device tracking systems employing electromagnetic fields (US 6,201,987)
entries.notes: Generator-side eddy-current compensation: modifies the transmit-coil current waveform (ideal current + compensation current defined by exponential amplitude/time-constant terms) to pre-cancel eddy distortion in the tracking volume - a feed-forward 'intelligent generator' approach. Inventor Dumoulin (GE). USPTO record verified; exact issue date to re-confirm.

entries.title: ISO 5725-1: Accuracy (trueness and precision) of measurement methods and results — Part 1: General principles and definitions
entries.notes: Defines the trueness (closeness to reference/systematic) vs precision (repeatability/reproducibility, random) decomposition of 'accuracy' used in Ch. 33 characterization metrics. Standard reference; clause numbers not cited.

entries.title: OpenIGTLink: an open network protocol for image-guided therapy environment
entries.venue: International Journal of Medical Robotics and Computer Assisted Surgery
entries.notes: De-facto open network protocol for image-guided therapy: TRANSFORM/POSITION/STATUS messages streaming tracker pose to navigation (3D Slicer, PLUS, Anser). Core integration reference for Ch.35. DOI/PMID(19621334)/PMC verified.

entries.title: PLUS: open-source toolkit for ultrasound-guided intervention systems
entries.notes: Open-source toolkit unifying tracking + imaging device interfaces, calibration, and OpenIGTLink streaming - a common integration substrate. Ch.35. DOI/PMID(24833412)/PMC verified.

entries.title: 3D Slicer as an image computing platform for the Quantitative Imaging Network
entries.notes: Open-source medical image-computing/navigation platform; with SlicerIGT + OpenIGTLink a common research integration endpoint for trackers. Ch.35. DOI/PMID(22770690) verified.

entries.title: IEC 62304:2006/AMD1:2015 Medical device software — Software life cycle processes
entries.notes: The medical-device software life-cycle standard: planning/requirements/architecture/design/implementation/integration/verification/release, risk-based software safety classes A/B/C, SOUP handling (AMD1:2015 adds legacy-software + risk-based classification). Software peer of IEC 60601 for Ch.35/17/29. Clause numbers not cited.

entries.title: Respiratory motion compensation with tracked internal and external sensors during CT-guided procedures
entries.notes: Sternum (external) + needle (internal) EM sensors; affine respiratory motion model; correlation up to 94% in steady respiration; internal-sensor residual motion reduced ~4x by compensation. Primary reference for the patient-reference/differential-tracking and motion chapters (T1.1/T1.4). DOI/PMID(16829505) verified; first author Borgert (Philips).

entries.title: Predicting error in rigid-body point-based registration
entries.notes: Foundational TRE theory: <TRE^2(r)> ~ (FLE^2/N)[1 + (1/3)sum_k d_k^2/f_k^2] (target distance from each principal axis k over fiducial RMS spread f_k); <FRE^2>~FLE^2(1-2/N). Primary reference for Ch. 39. DOI/PMID(9874293) verified.

entries.title: Fiducial registration error and target registration error are uncorrelated
entries.venue: Proc. SPIE 7261, Medical Imaging 2009: Visualization, Image-Guided Procedures, and Modeling
entries.notes: Proves to first order that FRE (goodness of fiducial fit) is statistically independent of TRE: a small displayed FRE gives NO information about registration accuracy at the target. The key clinical mis-use to correct. Ch. 39. DOI verified.

entries.title: Least-Squares Fitting of Two 3-D Point Sets
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
entries.notes: SVD closed-form least-squares rigid registration from a 3x3 cross-covariance of demeaned point sets. Primary algorithm reference (Ch. 40). DOI verified.

entries.title: Closed-form solution of absolute orientation using unit quaternions
entries.venue: Journal of the Optical Society of America A
entries.notes: Quaternion closed-form for rotation/translation/scale via the eigenvector of a 4x4 matrix from the cross-covariance; numerically robust, no reflection ambiguity. Ch. 40. DOI verified.

entries.title: Least-Squares Estimation of Transformation Parameters Between Two Point Patterns
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
entries.notes: Fixes the SVD solution to always yield a proper rotation (det correction diag(1,1,det(VU^T))) and adds scale; the standard robust paired-point solution. Ch. 40. DOI verified.

entries.title: A Method for Registration of 3-D Shapes
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
entries.notes: The Iterative Closest Point algorithm: alternate closest-point correspondence and paired-point rigid solve; monotone convergence to a local minimum; needs initialization. Ch. 40 (surface registration). DOI verified.

entries.title: Respiratory motion models: a review
entries.notes: Definitive review of respiratory motion models: surrogate signals, correspondence (surrogate->internal-motion) models, hysteresis, inter-cycle variability, fitting/validation. Primary reference for Ch. 41 motion modeling. DOI/PMID(23123330) verified.

entries.title: The management of respiratory motion in radiation oncology report of AAPM Task Group 76
entries.notes: Authoritative task-group report on respiratory-motion management: gating (phase/amplitude), breath-hold, end-expiration reproducibility, duty cycle, 4D-CT, residual-motion budgeting. Primary reference for Ch. 41 gating. DOI/PMID(17089851) verified.

entries.title: Electromagnetic interference with cardiac pacemakers and implantable cardioverter-defibrillators from low-frequency electromagnetic fields in vivo
entries.notes: In-vivo study of low-frequency-field EMI with pacemakers/ICDs: fields can be mis-sensed as cardiac activity (inhibition/inappropriate therapy), depending on field strength and (uni- vs bipolar) sensing configuration. The relevant immunity question for an EMT generator near the chest (Ch. 42 active-implant EMI). DOI/PMID(23125355) verified.

Griffiths, Introduction to Electrodynamics, 4th ed., Cambridge UP (add ISBN-verified)

Nixon et al. — eddy-current distortion characterization in EMT
